strengths.clinical_finisher: Rarely misses clear-cut chances in the box
strengths.electric_pace: Outruns most defenders in open play
strengths.press_resistant: Keeps the ball under close pressure
strengths.aerial_threat: Wins headers consistently, dangerous at set pieces
strengths.vision_playmaker: Picks out incisive through balls and switches
strengths.tackling_specialist: Wins the ball cleanly in one-on-one duels
strengths.leader: Lifts teammates' performance in tight games
strengths.overlap_specialist: Provides width and end product from fullback
strengths.composed_finisher: Stays calm one-on-one with the keeper
strengths.box_to_box_engine: Covers ground and contributes at both ends

weaknesses.rash_tackler: Prone to fouls and cards under pressure
weaknesses.injury_prone: Fitness risk over the course of a match
weaknesses.static_in_transition: Slow to react when possession changes
